auth.register-sub: Create your account with your institutional email

profile.title: My Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.bio-placeholder: Tell others a bit about yourself...
profile.no-courses: You haven't added any courses yet.
profile.add-course-placeholder: Pick an existing course or type a new one
profile.courses-hint: Pick a course already taught by other tutors, or type a new one and press Add.
profile.visibility-hint: If hidden, other students won't find you in tutor search.
profile.reviews-received-learner: Reviews I received from my tutors
profile.no-reviews-received-learner: You haven't received any reviews from a tutor yet.
profile.no-reviews-received: You haven't received any reviews yet.

about.title: About Us
about.content: SkillSwap is a collaborative learning platform connecting university students across Peru.

home.title: Welcome
home.content: Welcome to SkillSwap - Connect, Learn and Teach.

discovery.hero-title: Find the perfect tutor for you
discovery.hero-sub: Connect with verified students from different universities
discovery.search-placeholder: Search by subject, skill or name... e.g. Calculus, React, Physics
discovery.no-results-title: No tutors found for your search.
discovery.no-results-sub: Try different terms or adjust your filters.
discovery.no-bio: This tutor has not added a biography yet.
discovery.no-reviews: This tutor has not received any ratings yet.
discovery.request-note: You will be directed to create a session with this tutor.

sessions.title: Tutoring Sessions
sessions.empty-learner: You don't have any sessions as a learner yet.
sessions.empty-tutor: You don't have any sessions as a tutor yet.
sessions.confirm-delete: Are you sure you want to delete the session '{topic}'?
sessions.confirm-accept: Are you sure you want to accept the session '{topic}'?
sessions.confirm-reject: Are you sure you want to reject the session '{topic}'?
sessions.confirm-cancel: Are you sure you want to cancel the session '{topic}'?
sessions.no-pending-requests: You don't have any pending requests.
sessions.no-sent-requests: You haven't sent any requests yet.

session.from-discovery-sub: Pick a course, write a brief message, and choose the date you'd like to schedule the session with {tutorName}.
session.tutor-prefilled: Pre-filled from the selected tutor profile.
session.course-placeholder: Select a course this tutor teaches
session.course-empty: This tutor hasn't added any courses to their profile yet.
session.pending-warning-title: You already have a pending request
session.pending-warning-sub: You already sent a tutoring request to {tutorName} that's still pending approval. Wait for their response before sending another one.
session.initial-message-ph: Write your question or what you'd like to review...
session.initial-message-hint: This message will be shown to the tutor along with your request, before they accept or reject it.

workspace.title: Session Workspace
workspace.call-locked: Video call only available for scheduled sessions
workspace.no-messages: No messages yet. Start the conversation!
workspace.video-call-message: Video call in progress (simulation, WebRTC integration pending)
workspace.locked-sub: The chat and video call will be enabled once the tutor accepts this session.
workspace.session-ended-sub: This session is no longer active.
workspace.donation-title: Session completed! Would you like to reward your tutor?
workspace.donation-sub: Make a voluntary donation — the tutor keeps 95%, SkillSwap 5%.
workspace.review-sub: Your rating helps build the tutor's reputation on SkillSwap.
workspace.review-sub-tutor: Your rating helps other tutors get to know this learner.

wallets.title: Wallet
wallets.confirm-delete: Are you sure you want to delete wallet for user {userId}?
wallets.no-balance-title: You haven't received any donations yet
wallets.no-balance-sub: Your balance will show up here once a learner makes a donation to you.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.no-donations-title: You have not received any donations yet.
wallet.no-donations-sub: Complete tutoring sessions to start accumulating balance.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.confirm-delete: Are you sure you want to delete transaction #{id}?

transaction.no-wallet-title: This tutor doesn't have a wallet yet
transaction.no-wallet-sub: {name} hasn't set up their wallet to receive donations yet.
transaction.success-sub: Your contribution to {name} was sent successfully.
transaction.error-not-found: The tutor doesn't have a wallet set up yet.
transaction.error-unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
transaction.no-sender-wallet-title: You don't have a wallet set up yet
transaction.no-sender-wallet-sub: You need a wallet to make donations. Contact support to create one.
transaction.method-select-sub: Select how you want to pay for your donation
transaction.save-method-toggle: Save this payment method for next time
transaction.card-holder-ph: As it appears on the card
transaction.yape-scan-sub: Simulation — no real payment will be processed

moderation.reports-sub: Review conduct reports submitted by users and decide which sanctions to apply
moderation.sanctions-sub: Manage sanctions applied to reported users
moderation.sanction-new-sub: Apply a sanction to the reported user
moderation.report-success-sub: The moderation team will review the case and decide whether a sanction applies.
moderation.err-submit: Could not submit the report. Please try again.
moderation.err-duplicate-pending: You already have a pending report against this user. The moderation team must review it before you can report them again.
moderation.chat-sub: Session chat history for the reported user
moderation.chat-no-messages: No messages found for this report.
moderation.notice-warning-count: You have {count} of 3 warnings this month. Reaching 3 will automatically suspend your account for 1 month.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.confirm-delete: Are you sure you want to delete review #{id}?

learning.quizzes-sub: Create and manage official quizzes for your courses
learning.quiz-new-sub: Create a new quiz for the official bank
learning.field-title-ph: e.g. Quiz on limits and continuity
learning.field-description-ph: Brief description of the quiz content
learning.correct-hint: Select the radio button to mark the correct answer
learning.no-questions-yet: No questions added yet. Click "Add question" to start.
learning.err-no-questions: You must add at least one question
learning.err-incomplete-question: All questions and their options must be filled in
learning.attempt-done-sub: Your quiz has been submitted successfully.
learning.attempt-error: An error occurred while submitting the quiz. Please try again.
learning.attempt-waiting-sub: Once the learner completes this quiz, you'll be able to see their score and a breakdown of their answers here.
